pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Governance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.438) to justify inclusion for the Data Platform Team Lead. Without stronger framework alignment, this ability KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain ability KSA be expected in real-world Data Platform Team Lead roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Governance is not a standard competency expectation for Data Platform Team Lead. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Data Platform Team Lead competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.438) and edge-domain placement (Data Governance) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Data Platform Team Lead. All passes support exclusion.
